notes: Enables anonymous product analytics (counts and feature events only — never your documents, names, or health data; off if you opted out). Plus everything from 1.2.7: full Claude Code power (it can create/edit files and run the shell to build real documents and PDFs), send a follow-up while a reply is streaming (it queues and sends in order), right-click a chat tab to copy its title or the whole conversation, and faster auto-update checks (hourly and on wake).
